security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* https://localhost:*; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';

bundle.shortDescription: Local CTI copilot (Ollama + allowlisted scripts and tools)
bundle.longDescription: Bacongris is a local desktop app that runs a tool-using agent with Ollama, an optional integrated terminal, and a strict allowlist for files and executables. Use it to drive CTI workflows in your own workspace without sending data to the cloud.
